content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market in risk-on mode: Nifty +0.90%, Auto +2.27%, IT +1.42%, VIX cooling -7%. Existing book is well-positioned with all 8 holdings near or above entry. Priority is to lock in gains by trailing SLs, not stack new exposure — book already 50% deployed and several pending orders are working. Cluster risk in energy/power (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA already held).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op suppressed — current SL 1028.02 already locks in ~4.5% gain on Rs 984 entry. Stock pulled back -1% intraday from Rs 1050 high; existing trail is appropriate. Holding for Rs 1110 target. (Submitting same values to confirm intent — actually emitting HOLD via position_actions.)"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.8%, well above SL of 119. Gold consolidating after record rally; risk-on day pressuring it but structural supports (central bank buying, geopolitics) intact. SL gives room to breathe."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +2.9%, broke 52-week high to Rs 1456. Current SL Rs 1438 is just above entry — already locked in ~1.8%. Raising target to Rs 1500 given Q4 momentum (PAT +27%). SL stays at 1438 (above breakeven), keeping mandated trail. Original target 1485 nearly hit — extending."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 402.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 398 to 402 — still gives ~1.3% room from CMP 406.60. Power demand record (256 GW) supportive into Q4 results May 15. Reduces risk while keeping upside intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.1%; SL already at Rs 1742 (above entry 1734), locked in breakeven+. Volume surge 5.3x + Organon deal catalyst. Holding for Rs 1830. (No-op — existing values confirmed.)"
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 316.50 to 318. Defensive utility, strong capex visibility, peak demand record. Small tighten reduces risk further; gain still being protected."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 466.00,
      "new_target": 488.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +3.9% on Q4 beat (PAT +11%). Tightening SL from 465 to 466 — small tighten, well below CMP 470.15. Dividend yield + production targets supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 605.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68%, Rs 11/share dividend record date Apr 30 (tomorrow — stock will adjust ex-div). Tightening SL from 598 to 605 (still below CMP 614 with adequate buffer for ex-div drop). LME zinc supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 250,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 197.00,
      "stop_loss": 188.00,
      "target": 215.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68% YoY, GNPA improved to 3.3%, 52-week breakout on 1.5x volume. Position size ~5% (Rs 49k) given confidence in 0.55-0.65 range. SL 188 = 4.6% risk; R:R = 1:2. Risk budget: 5% × 4.6% = 0.23% portfolio. New chairman Panda + post-results re-rating catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "11.45% gap-up on low 0.4x volume into May 4 results — Morgan Stanley double-downgraded with PT cut to Rs 566 (~30% below CMP). Two consecutive quarters of widening losses. Avoid pre-results chase."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -6.4% YoY despite record sales — margin compression; market share at 13-yr low. Stock rallied on revenue print but earnings quality weak. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 5.7% to 52w high on low 0.3x volume. Energy cluster already heavy in book (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA). MACD bearish crossover. Skip — cluster discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TECHM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 missed Street on revenue, headcount cut 2,000, telecom vertical pressured. Sector under AI-disruption de-rating. Bounce play only — no edge."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ITC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cigarette tax overhang with FY27/28 EPS cuts of 12-13%. Pre-results May 5. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HEROMOTOCO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Auto sector chase after +2.81% — book already at 50% deployment, no edge to add."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "reasoning": "Existing SL at 1028 already locks ~4.5% gain. Stock pulled back to Rs 1035; SL gives ~0.7% buffer. No change warranted yet — let it breathe; will trail again if it reclaims 1050."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.8%, SL 119 below CMP 122.64. Gold thesis intact; risk-on chop expected. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1438 (above entry 1412.94). Keeping target stretched to 1500 given 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 402.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 398 to 402 — still allows 1.1% volatility room from CMP 406.60. Reduces risk into Q4 results May 15."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1742 above entry 1734 — breakeven+ secured. Volume surge confirms institutional interest on Organon deal."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 316.50 to 318. Defensive position, modest risk reduction."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 466.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat printed +11% PAT; tighten SL slightly to lock more of the +0.4% move and Rs 5.25 dividend optionality."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 605.00,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend Apr 30 — Rs 11/share will reduce price ~Rs 11. Tightening SL from 598 to 605 (still allows ex-div drop without triggering). Q4 PAT +68% supportive."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GLENMARK BUY @2400 already OPEN — leave it. PHARMABEES @23.65 and TATAPOWER @443 still pending — leave alone, do not stack. BANDHANBNK is the one new conviction add (Q4 PAT +68% breakout). Watching CEATLTD/RKFORGE for auto-ancillary continuation but not chasing today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 50% deployed, +0.86% session, +0.42% experiment. With BANDHANBNK add (+~5%) and existing pending orders, will approach 60-65% deployed — entering deployment-hysteresis zone. Energy/power cluster (NTPC+POWERGRID+COALINDIA = ~17% of book) approaching the 20% cluster threshold; will not add more energy names. Rolling 5-day win rate is poor (14%) — emphasis on tightening SLs over new entries. All MODIFYs tighten SL only, none loosen."
}
